Package DSA.Sorting

Class GTUSorter

  • java.lang.Object
    • DSA.Sorting.GTUSorter
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    GTUInsertSort, GTUQuickSort, GTUSelectSort
    public abstract class GTUSorter
extends java.lang.Object
    A generic class for sorting arrays.

    • Constructor Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      protected abstract <T> void sort​(T[] arr, int start, int end, java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
      Sort elements in arr between start (inclusive) and end (exclusive) in ascending order.
      <T> void sort​(T[] arr, java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
      Sort arr in ascending order.

    • Method Detail

      • sort

        public <T> void sort​(T[] arr,
                     java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
        Sort arr in ascending order.
        Type Parameters:
        T - Any type.
        Parameters:
        arr - Array to be sorted.
        comparator - A comparable of type T.

      • sort

        protected abstract <T> void sort​(T[] arr,
                                 int start,
                                 int end,
                                 java.util.Comparator<T> comparator)
        Sort elements in arr between start (inclusive) and end (exclusive) in ascending order.
        Type Parameters:
        T - Any type.
        Parameters:
        arr - Array to be sorted.
        start - First index (inclusive).
        end - Last index (exclusive).
        comparator - A comparable of type T.
